testcase.name: validators isSubsetOf() should return true if a set is subset of a superset
GeoJSONBase addData() should apply _getNativeFeatures() to the given parameter
GeoJSONBase addData() should emit a featuresAdded event after adding data
GeoJSONBase addData() should not emit a featuresAdded event with no features
GeoJSONBase addData() should wrap every feature with _wrapNativeFeature()
GeoJSONBase _handleFeatureClicked() should emit a featureClick event
GeoJSONBase _handleFeatureClicked() should wrap the given feature with _wrapNativeFeature()
GeoJSONBase _getNativeFeatures() should throw a not implemented error
GeoJSONBase _wrapNativeFeature() should throw a not implemented error
MarkerBase _handleNativeEvent should call _getNormalizedEventData with the given event
MarkerBase _handleNativeEvent should emit an event with the given event type
MarkerBase _handleNativeEvent should add the normalized event data
MarkerBase _getNativeEventFunction returns a function
MarkerBase _getNativeEventFunction returns a function that calls _handleNativeEvent when executed
MarkerBase _getNativeEventFunction returns a function that calls _handleNativeEvent with the given event object when executed
MarkerBase _getNativeEventFunction returns a function that calls _handleNativeEvent with the given event type when executed
MarkerBase _getNativeMarker should throw a not implemented error
MarkerBase _getNormalizedEventData should throw a not implemented error
MapBase addMarker() should pass the given location object to the constructor
MapBase addMarker() should pass the existing _map to the constructor
MapBase addMarker() should do nothing is MarkerImpl is not implemented
MapBase constructor() should call _initializeMap as a fallback
MapBase destructor() should dispose existing _geoJSONLayer
MapBase destructor() should dispose existing search custom control
MapBase getNativeMap() should return the _map property
MapBase openDialog() should call _getDialog() method
MapBase openDialog() should call dialog.open() with the given dialog config
MapBase _bindUIMB() should bind handlers to featuresAdded and featureClick events on geoJSONLayer
MapBase _bindUIMB() should bind handlers to dragend event on geolocationMarker
MapBase _bindUIMB() should bind handlers to click event on customControls[HOME]
MapBase _bindUIMB() should bind handlers to search event on customControls[SEARCH]
MapBase _getDialog() should do nothing if there is no MapBase.DialogImpl
MapBase _getDialog() should pass the existing map to the dialog constructor
MapBase _getDialog() should reuse the existing dialog instance
MapBase _getGeoCoder() should do nothing if there is no MapBase.GeocoderImpl
MapBase _getGeoCoder() should reuse the existing geocoder instance
MapBase _initializeGeoJSONData() should do nothing if there is no data attribute
MapBase _initializeGeoJSONData() should call geoJSONLayer.addData with data attribute
MapBase _initializeLocation() should directly call initializeMap with the given location if geolocation is false
MapBase _initializeMap() should store the given position as position
MapBase _initializeMap() should store the given position as originalPosition
MapBase _initializeMap() should create a new map and store it as _map
MapBase _initializeMap() should call _getControlsConfig()
MapBase _initializeMap() should call _createCustomControls()
MapBase _initializeMap() should call _bindUIMB()
MapBase _initializeMap() should call _initializeGeoJSONData()
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeaturesAdded() should get the map bounds using getBounds()
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeaturesAdded() should get the feature geometry for each feature
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeaturesAdded() should update the map position when there is a single feature
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeaturesAdded() should add the features locations to the map bounds when there are multiple features
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeatureClicked() should emit a featureClick event
MapBase _handleGeoJSONLayerFeatureClicked() should send the given feature as event data
MapBase _handleGeoLocationMarkerDragended() should get the location position with geocoder.reverse()
MapBase _handleGeoLocationMarkerDragended() should update the instance position
MapBase _handleHomeButtonClicked() should call preventDefault on the given event
MapBase _handleHomeButtonClicked() should set the instance position to _originalPosition
MapBase _handlePositionChanged() should call setCenter with the given location
MapBase _handlePositionChanged() should update the geolocationMarker position if present
MapBase _handleSearchButtonClicked() should update the instance position
MapBase getBounds() should throw a not implemented Error
MapBase setCenter() should throw a not implemented Error
MapBase _createMap() should throw a not implemented Error
